article_title: .NET 10 Clean Architecture 实战：从空目录到可运行的电影管理 API
core_theme: 用 .NET 10 从零搭建 Clean Architecture 四层项目，依赖只朝内指向 Domain
reader_takeaway: 读完可以跟着操作，建出一个四层分明、编译器强制依赖方向、带 Aspire 编排和领域单元测试的 .NET 10 Web API
summary_angle: 四个同心层 + 一条规则 = 编译器替你守住架构

information_blocks.source_anchor: Domain → Application → Infrastructure → API，箭头只朝内
information_blocks.visual_idea: 四个同心圆/环，从中心到外层，箭头朝内

information_blocks.source_anchor: IApplicationDbContext 接口定义在 Application，Infrastructure 的 DbContext 实现它
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个接口符号连接到一个数据库符号，线条简洁

information_blocks.source_anchor: 10 个领域单元测试 155ms 跑完，不需要数据库和 Web 服务器
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个勾号 + 155ms 数字标签

main_metaphor: 四层同心环，核心是纯净的领域层，外层逐层包裹
primary_subject: 四个同心圆环代表 Domain / Application / Infrastructure / API
subject_action: 箭头从外层指向内层核心
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color
selected_style_reason: 从 40 项风格池中随机选中
style_safety_note: 该风格不指向任何品牌、工作室或艺术家，无需安全改写
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证四层同心环构图 + 极简线稿风格是否成立
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Editorial technical illustration in a minimalist line-art style with sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, and limited accent color. Four concentric rings at center representing software architecture layers, labeled from innermost to outermost: 'Domain' in deep navy. Thin inward-pointing arrows from outer rings toward core. A small interface icon connecting to a database symbol on the right side. A checkmark chip with '155ms' in the lower portion. Background: clean off-white with subtle grid lines. Palette: deep navy #1a1a2e, coral accent #e94560, off-white #f5f5f5. No poster title, no English slogan, no fake UI, no dashboard, no terminal output, no watermark, no clutter.
